name: com.pulsemcp/playwright-stealth
description: Browser automation using Playwright with optional stealth mode to bypass anti-bot protection.

environmentVariables.name: STEALTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Enable stealth mode with anti-detection measures.

environmentVariables.name: STEALTH_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Custom User-Agent string for stealth mode.

environmentVariables.name: STEALTH_MASK_LINUX
environmentVariables.description: Mask Linux in User-Agent as Windows to avoid fingerprint mismatch.

environmentVariables.name: STEALTH_LOCALE
environmentVariables.description: Custom locale for Accept-Language header in stealth mode.

environmentVariables.name: TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Default timeout for Playwright actions in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Default timeout for page navigation in milliseconds.

environmentVariables.name: PROXY_BYPASS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of hosts to bypass proxy.

environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_PERMISSIONS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of browser permissions to grant.
